programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q pose as nutritionists conducting consultations, and ask shoppers at a grocery store if they should quit

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q play concierges in a hotel lobby, doing and saying what they are told, then try to get insurance fraud at a grocery store using strangers as witnesses

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q read journal entries from their daughter's diaries, then ask strangers if they should break up with their girlfriends for ridiculous reasons

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie is thrilled to learn that Robert's new girlfriend is a virgin, so Ray tries to convince her that Debra is a 'good girl' too, leading to a revelation from Marie and Frank

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra gets involved in a heated dispute with another parent at Ally's little league baseball match, but Ray fails to take her side because he is afraid of making himself unpopular. Dan Castellaneta, better known as the voice of Homer Simpson, guest stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert's traffic-school students complain they are fed up with his class, so he resorts to teaching them using a puppet - an innovation that proves far from boring. American comedy, starring Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A discovery makes Ray worry about his mortality - and prompts him to compile a list of things he wants to do before he dies. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra clears out all the kids' old baby clothes and gives them to a jumble sale, making Ray realise she is resigned to not having any more children

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part one of two. Flashback episode in which the Barones recall their courtship and wedding, beginning with Ray's nervous marriage proposal - and subsequent uncertainty over Debra's motive for accepting

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Chandler in a Box
programme.desc: Chandler agrees to spend Thanksgiving in a packing crate as penance for kissing Kathy, and the friends decide to give each other seasonal gifts. Monica visits Richard's son, who finds her every bit as attractive as his father did. Comedy, guest starring Michael Vartan

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where They're Going to Party!
programme.desc: Things start looking up for the gang as Monica gets a career opportunity that is too good to turn down and Rachel is offered a promotion. Meanwhile, Ross and Chandler are excited to hear an old friend is coming to visit. Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Girl from Poughkeepsie
programme.desc: Ross embarks on a long-distance relationship, Chandler sets Rachel up with one of his colleagues, and Phoebe composes a seasonal song for her friends. Monica has trouble asserting her authority at work and hires Joey so she can fire him in front of the staff

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's half-brother makes a startling announcement and asks a great favour of her, while Joey attempts to break down social barriers when he takes a job as a tour guide at Ross's museum. Chandler fears not living up to Kathy's expectations

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns the result of her pregnancy test and the friends' competitive spirit gets the better of them in a battle of the sexes arising from an apparently simple challenge. Comedy, starring Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel schemes to get a handsome client to ask her out on a date, while Chandler's girlfriend is driven away by his jealousy. Guest starring Tate Donovan

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Joey's Dirty Day
programme.desc: Chandler visits a strip club and Rachel comes to regret asking Ross for a favour. Meanwhile, Charlton Heston discovers his co-star Joey in a compromising position on the first day of filming

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Rugby
programme.desc: Ross makes the mistake of agreeing to a game of rugby with Emily's tough English friends. Meanwhile, one of Chandler's old flames turns up out of the blue - and it seems it is not just a flying visit

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Fake Party
programme.desc: Rachel spoils Ross's plans of a romantic last evening with Emily before she returns to England by organising a farewell party and inviting everyone. Meanwhile Phoebe's pregnancy causes her to abandon her vegetarian lifestyle as she craves meat. Comedy, guest starring Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Free Porn
programme.desc: Ross pours out his heart to Emily, but is unprepared for her reaction, while Phoebe receives surprising news about her pregnancy. Chandler and Joey get free adult films on their TV and try to make sure they do not disappear

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachel's New Dress
programme.desc: Rachel's date is ruined when Joshua's parents return home earlier than expected and catch her parading round in a skimpy nightie - which she then has to pretend is a new dress. Starring Jennifer Aniston and Tate Donovan

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Haste
programme.desc: Monica and Rachel plot to take back their old apartment from Chandler and Joey, and there are major changes afoot for lovebirds Ross and Emily. Comedy, starring Courteney Cox and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Wedding Dresses
programme.desc: Chandler reaches the end of his tether over Joey's snoring and forces him to seek professional help, while Rachel has a drastic reaction to Ross's engagement. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross reminisces with Rachel about the good times they had when they were dating, as the invitations go out for his wedding. Meanwhile, the others work out whether they can attend the ceremony. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Worst Best Man Ever
programme.desc: Joey somehow manages to lose Ross's wedding ring at the stag party, while Phoebe's pregnancy causes her to experience violent mood swings. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Ross's Wedding - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Rachel and a heavily pregnant Phoebe stay at home while Chandler, Joey and Monica go to England for Ross's wedding to Emily. Once there, however, it seems all Joey and Chandler can do is bicker. Guest starring Richard Branson and Sarah Ferguson

programme.title: Michael McIntyre: Live & Laughing
programme.desc: Stand-up comedy performed in front of a sell-out crowd at London's Hammersmith Apollo. The show features humorous observations on becoming a father, life on the road, and the 'man drawer' in every house, where males keep those essential items they are sure they will need again

programme.title: Impractical Jokers

programme.title: Utopia

programme.title: Iain Stirling's Roast the Internet

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Fitness fanatic Jade, 24, sits down for a meal with Jak, 29, a yoga lover in touch with his spiritual side and who shares her love of exercise and tattoos, while fashion stylist Christine, 70, and entrepreneur Peter, 71, share stories of the Swinging Sixties. Health club manager Donna, 51, is a born romantic with old fashioned values at heart and her date is 53-year-old stetson-wearing Simon from Dallas, Texas, who's happy to stand out from the crowd and is looking for a strong woman to stand by his side

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dina, 39, is keen to settle down and start a family, but her date, 41-year-old Stephen, is a born adventurer who has climbed the Matterhorn and swum oceans. Will he run a mile when she shares her intentions with him? Margaret, 73, hasn't been on a date for 44 years and is looking for a family man who shares her love of music and life, while art student Rachel, meets vegan singer-songwriter and self-confessed hippie Hari

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on the Eurovision Song Contest, Faking It, Virgin Island, The Four Seasons, Night Coppers, Inside Our Minds, Naked and Afraid, and Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to be romantic when the family goes on holiday to Hawaii, and Jay realises it will not be as relaxing as he had hoped. Elsewhere, Mitch and Cam cannot decide whether to go sightseeing, and the children run riot. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire's plans for a family portrait do not go smoothly, and Cameron reveals his inner diva. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen and Eric Stonestreet

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. Things look up for one family, while panic sets in for another, and the police give the Osbornes some worrying news. Two residents decide to move forward together, and Warren steps in to help Mercedes. Friends support Tony as he tries to find the words for Diane's eulogy. Dodger and Theresa take their relationship to the next level, and a resident makes a discovery that stops them in their tracks

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old car, Mitchell decides to build a large princess castle for Lily, and Manny invites a girl over for a study date - which makes Gloria uncomfortable. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mother when she finds out that Alex has a crush on a boy, and Haley's idea of sisterly advice is not helping matters. Meanwhile, Mitchell and Cameron have an argument over the former's aversion to public displays of affection, and Gloria believes that her grandmother has been visiting in her dreams. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The couples mark their one-month anniversaries, but some of them cannot quite believe it has only been a month and not an eternity

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: A lie spirals into a gigantic conflict for one couple, and with revelations happening left, right and centre, all of the relationships start shifting in new directions

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Spanish Pavillion, Kingston Cafe, La Frite and Capri
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he earlier tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or fell by the wayside. First he visits the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, then heads to California to see the owners of Kingston Cafe, French-themed La Frite, and Capri

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog (2020)
programme.desc: Sonic, a blue hedgehog who can run at supersonic speeds, is transported to Earth. A decade later, while enjoying life in Montana, his speedy skills create an electromagnetic pulse. Scientific genius Dr Robotnik is hired to investigate, and becomes obsessed with capturing the creature for his power. Live-action fantasy adventure based on the video games, starring James Marsden and Jim Carrey, with the voice of Ben Schwartz

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa becomes insecure about her size after she and Bart contract a bizarre infection that requires treatment from steroids that cause temporary weight gain

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Portrait of a Lackey on Fire

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Mr Burns fight for the soul of brash young football prodigy Grayson Mathers

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: It's the grand finale, and in Kuala Lumpur, the top three teams are put to the ultimate test using skills they've perfected during the race so far. They're tasked with recreating a dessert with help from a python, hunting for a treasure map in a bookstore, and making their way to the other side of the city by any means possible. The duos must also recall locations from the places they've raced through, before a pit stop finish like never before

programme.title: Moonfall (2022)
programme.desc: A mysterious force knocks the Moon from its orbit and sends the Earth's only natural satellite on a collision course with our planet. Astronauts Jocinda Fowler and Brian Harper, who served together on an ill-fated space mission, join forces with conspiracy theorist KC Houseman to avert catastrophe. Director Roland Emmerich's sci-fi thriller, starring Patrick Wilson, Halle Berry, John Bradley and Donald Sutherland in one of his final films

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hordes of the creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 22-year-old gym addict Sophie from Surrey, who is desperate to find a man who boasts a little banter. Next up is Dom, a 25-year-old wedding model from Bournemouth. He wants to find the perfect man to waltz him down the aisle and thinks people that can guarantee to do this are confident, daring and adventurous in their outlook

programme.title: Naked Attraction

The trouble is she's open to dating men from their 20s to their 60s and finds it hard to choose. Will she find it easier to pick the right partner when they're all naked? programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With a fractious atmosphere in the air, the couples head off for a weekend retreat. And there are big questions looming for all of the newlyweds

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay and Gloria celebrate their anniversary, but cannot decide on what kind of gift to give each other. Meanwhile, the Dunphys join Alex on her college tour and Phil, Luke and Haley find themselves in a mirrored waiting room with a button and a sign that says 'Do Not Push'. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil comes across footage of an incriminating sneeze while looking at Cameron and Mitchell's wedding video that proves he is responsible for the family's flu epidemic, so he sets about getting rid of the proof with the help of Luke and some creative editing. Claire struggles to make it through an important business meeting while feeling under the weather, while Cam is forced to make a difficult decision when it comes to Manny and the school football team. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer falls out with Marge over revelations contained in an old letter, and moves into the home of a gay couple who keep him happy by plying him with food. With the guest voice of 'Weird Al' Yankovic

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family spends Christmas on a ranch, where Lisa falls in love with an older boy, and Homer and Bart help locals protesting against a dam built by industrious beavers. Featuring the guest voices of David Byrne, Jonathan Taylor Thomas and Andy Serkis

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Santa's Little Helper is thrown out of the house for failing to save Homer from a fire - but goes on to earn a fortune as the new Duff Beer mascot, making him the subject of a bitter ownership battle

programme.title: The Simpsons

Featuring the guest voices of Steve Busmen and singer-songwriter Jackson Browne

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta enlists Jeffords to help him tackle a cold case that everyone thinks is unsolvable. Meanwhile, Santiago plans a romantic weekend away with her new boyfriend Teddy, and Gina and Diaz tell Boyle one of their best-kept secrets. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta suspects a civic leader of money laundering, but his investigation is shut down by the police commissioner. Determined to crack the case, he enlists Santiago and Holt to help uncover more evidence - and risks suspension as a result. Boyle is devastated when Vivian ends their relationship, so his colleagues try to cheer him up

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers at Jay and Gloria's to celebrate Alex's graduation, but Phil is devastated to be missing the occasion thanks to an ear infection preventing him from flying home from a business trip to Seattle. Jay frets about Gloria's cousin, who has overstayed his welcome, while Claire stresses about giving Alex the perfect gift. Mitch hides important news from Cam, and Andy and Haley finally come to a realisation about their feelings for each other

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The return of the American comedy about a man and his extended family living in three different households. Recent events force Haley and Andy to cope with their emotions in different ways, while Jay and Gloria are in for a shock when they start looking for a pre-school for Joe. Plus, Cam attempts to remain supportive of Mitch's midlife career crisis, but when money begins to get tight, he hatches a plan. Ed O'Neill Stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: The Day Alex Left for College
programme.desc: Phil and Claire feel rejected when Alex deliberately tells them the wrong date for her moving-in day at college as she wants to keep things as low-key as possible, while Luke makes it clear he would rather hang out with schoolfriends than spend the day with his dad. Elsewhere, the rest of the family come up with an elaborate excuse to avoid going to Lily's football game, and things get stressful for Mitch and Cam now after they decided to rent out their top floor

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil helps Haley persuade Claire to let Dylan move in, but he soon has second thoughts after he discovers just what living with him really means. Meanwhile, Mitch takes on a much-needed new role working for Jay's business rivals Closets, Closets, Closets, Closets! and Gloria and Cameron come to blows over how to deal with Manny's problem at school.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a doting father and decides to spend quality time with his youngest daughter when he discovers Santa's Little Helper knows Maggie better than he does. Meanwhile, a lonely Moe joins an online dating agency, and gets a pleasant surprise when he meets an attractive woman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to eat bland food after he burns his taste buds while trying to copy a fire-eating street performer. Meanwhile, Marge enjoys a sauna she discovers in the basement

programme.title: The Simpsons

Bart wastes no time in establishing a bad-boy persona, and increases Lisa's popularity by telling people she knows a pop star. With the voice of Elliot Page (Juno)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The village gathers for Diane's funeral, and Dee Dee struggles to hide her emotions after a recent discovery. Elsewhere, Beth continues to seek justice, and a resident's trauma catches up with them

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a union representative at the power plant and immediately uses his new-found authority to save the company's free dental plan and avoid having to pay for Lisa's new braces. Featuring the voice of Dr Joyce Brothers

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: As the retreat winds down, one couple make amends while others begin planning for the future. However, a serious roadblock forces one pair to confront deep issues and question whether their marriage can last the distance

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty six-year-old psychology student Alesia is tired of meeting 'boys' and is now seeking someone more emotionally mature than her previous partners. Next up is Louise from London, who has travelled the world and been on over 200 dates, but is still no closer to finding her soul mate. Anna Richardson assists both singletons, inviting them to choose their favourite partner from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time until fully nude. The contenders then don their glad rags to enjoy a date together

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Divorced couple Stuart and Mandy arrive in the restaurant to offer each other moral support as they try to find love again. Mandy wants an adventurer to whisk her off her feet, and her date, globetrotting Adam, could be just the ticket. Across the restaurant, sparks are also flying as Stuart's cheeky humour has fellow divorcee Claire in stitches. Meanwhile, 30-year-old financial manager J meets aesthetic therapist Sophie, and 23-year-old Nathan has his work cut out to try and win over 21-year-old Morganne

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: An edition from October 2022, in which the armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions to I Can See Your Voice, Emmerdale, Strictly Come Dancing, Unbreakable, The Ex-Wife, Bargain Hunt, and news coverage of a new Chancellor

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: As the retreat winds down, one couple make amends while others begin planning for the future. However, a serious roadblock forces one pair to confront deep issues and question whether their marriage can last the distance

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield is the setting for parodies of Mad Men, Michael Bay's Transformers and It's the Great Pumpkin, Charlie Brown in this Halloween-themed episode. Homer's vote on election day is misread by a renegade machine, Lisa's Malibu Stacy car turns into a robot determined to start a war, and a giant pumpkin seeks revenge

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam plans to attend the school dance with Dana, and reluctantly agrees to take dancing lessons with Beverly. Meanwhile, Murray is forced to have the 'talk' with Adam, but he admits that he hasn't spoken to Barry about sex yet. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Roisin Conaty and Kiri Pritchard-McLean take on Jon Richardson and Rob Beckett. Comedian Hugh Davies is in Dictionary Corner. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Lee Mack and Joe Wilkinson take on Jon Richardson and Jessica Knappett. Comedian Nigel Ng is in Dictionary Corner. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 27-year-old man from Essex hopes to give his fiancee and former boss in the Navy the wedding of her dreams. However, he is torn between the wishes of the bride, who wants him to take charge of organising the ceremony, and his best man, who encourages him to take a more laid-back approach to the task and return to the laddish ways of his past

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A 30-year-old Newcastle man hopes to give his 26-year-old art-teacher fiancee the wedding of her dreams. The couple have been inseparable since they met five years ago while working behind a bar, but the groom's love of science fiction is at odds with the bride's sophisticated tastes

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Anna, a 31-year-old support worker from Liverpool hopes to give her fiancee Sian the ceremony of her dreams. However, she struggles to set aside her tomboy tendencies and adapt to the feminine world of wedding planning, and best woman Jade threatens to be more of a hindrance than a help

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Former participants Amit Kleinberger, Randy DeWitt and Steve Greenbaum want to take another look at the everyday workings of their businesses, but fear they will be recognised. They each send an employee in their place to report on how their firms are functioning

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jeff Platt, the president and CEO of entertainment and fitness business Sky Zone, poses as a contestant on a reality TV show who is trying to win an action-adventure holiday. He aims to discover whether his fast-growing company is running as smoothly and efficiently as possible, but his secret identity is jeopardised when he encounters a colleague he has met on a previous occasion

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kicking off the competition in Edinburgh are young lovebirds Andy and Pim, who are hoping to impress their guests with a Scottish and Thai-themed menu - with a bit of American thrown in for good measure. On the second night, the group learns more about Jimmy and Jas's fairy-tale first encounter, as well as Jimmy's fledgling modelling career, which surprises everyone. Night three sees a bromance between Andy and Stuart blossom, and everyone needs an open mind when they sample plumber Stuart and hairdresser Jack's experimental menu

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glasgow pair Jean and Ron hope their 'taste of Scotland' menu will impress their guests. Day two sees Colin and Craig try to claw back the limelight and jolly up the mood

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Sussex, childhood sweethearts Jemma and James kick off with a menu based on their unlikely romance, finding a cold soup starter divides opinions. On day two, soon-to-be-retired dinner party veterans Phil and Sue cook up a menu of home comfort food, but disaster strikes in the dessert. On the final day, critical Steve and Aaron prepare a pescatarian feast with a fish-shaped salmon Wellington. Once again James and Jemma have to defend their relationship due to their less than romantic behaviour

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to Murphy's Historic Hotel near Sacramento in northern California, where owners Brian, Kevin and Joel are often too distracted by their lively bar to look after their business. The national landmark, which has played host to an array of famous names including Mark Twain, President Ulysses S Grant and JP Morgan, has no dedicated accommodation manager, so guests sometimes struggle to receive the attention they need and end up feeling the hotel has become an afterthought beside the noisy saloon

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to Connecticut's oldest inn, the Curtis House in Woodbury, which has been owned by the Hardisty family for generations. However, the business has started to fall apart and their legacy is on the brink of being lost. Siblings Chris and TJ, who are in charge, no longer speak to each other and the staff and guests feel stuck in the middle

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Pipestone, Minnesota, where he checks in to Historic Calumet Inn. Joint owners Vanda and Rina Smrkovski were given the hotel as a gift by their father, but after just nine months in charge, their staff are on the brink of revolt, and guests are expressing their dissatisfaction with the accommodation. Gordon quickly realises the sisters need to grow up fast if he's going to have a chance of saving the business

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Angler's Lodge in Island Park, Idaho. Owner Dave Eby built the lodge with his own hands, but a family tragedy has caused him and wife Dede to shy away from the hotel and the community. Gordon is desperate to help mend this broken family - but is it too late to save their business?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Southbridge, Massachusetts, where he checks into the Vienna Inn, an Austrian-themed hotels and restaurant. Owners Jonathan and Lisa Krach have seen their cluttered inn acquire a negative reputation among the locals, and as a result, business isn't what it used to be. Can Gordon turn things round and keep the doors to this historic hotel open?

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. In a departure from the generally friendly tone of the show, Alex Horne and Joel Dommett trade insults across tasks. But name-calling is the least of the Taskmaster's worries as he witnesses Joanna Page doing something startling with a pineapple, Armando Iannucci doing something confusing with a nursery rhyme and Amy Gledhill doing something unexpected with balls of ice. Meanwhile, Kumail Nanjiani reveals something unusual about his body

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Russell Howard & Mum
programme.desc: The comedian and his mother are in South Carolina, where they join a demolition derby team finding new and bizarre ways to smash up cars

programme.title: Russell Howard & Mum

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats

Irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: The team helps doting dad Adam, whose bawdy butterfly is coming between him and his family time, and bikini fan Shannon, who is hoping to cover up an embarrassing birthmark

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson are joined by guests Roisin Conaty, Alex Brooker, Joe Wilkinson and Chris Ramsey to answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country, finding out who best understands what is going on in Britain today. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jose Costa, the president of North Carolina-based automotive-care franchise Maaco, goes undercover to join his employees on the frontline, disguised as a food truck owner competing in a reality show. He wants to meet the staff who keep the firm on the road to success and find out whether his franchisees are following guidelines

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Gina Rivera, the president of Phenix Salon Suites in Colorado Springs - a company that rents boutiques to hairdressers, nail technicians and beauty therapists - goes incognito to see first-hand what she needs to improve on and what makes her franchisees successful

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? Nicole and firefighter Matt's compact 1950s home may have been built in the rock n roll era, but it's neither rocking nor rolling. In fact, it needs a serious refurb. Who better to get involved than Jonathan, Drew and Matt's firefighting buddies? The brothers start at full steam ahead as they try to heat up the property's appearance

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Jade and Stuart kick off the competition in Essex with a fun and spontaneous menu. On day two, Mark and Diane bring a taste of their Mediterranean travels to their menu, by way of their garden, and encourage their guests to sing with them. Finally it's the turn of image-conscious Chris and Rosella to wow their guests with Rosella's nana's Italian recipe. Brewing tension from the week finally comes to a head, before the winner is revealed

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Married couple Lara and Greg kick off the competition in Lincolnshire with a global menu inspired by their passion for travelling. On day two, football-mad Andrew and Liz attempt a dress rehearsal for their upcoming wedding breakfast, but guest Jenna's announcement that Mitch won't propose to her sets tongues wagging. Finally, it's ditzy duo Jenna and Mitch's chance to show their guests that looks can be deceptive as they also compete for the cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: South Londoner James is given £12,000 and a maximum of three weeks to plan every detail of his nuptials, but future mother-in-law Janey lends a helping hand, determined to give her daughter Daisy a cockney knees-up. The laid-back groom-to-be wants a more romantic day, but has to decide whether 'mother knows best' as he sets out to give his bride the wedding she deserves

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: More baffled brides get their own back on their hapless grooms in this festive episode, with Kayleigh, Fern, Lauren, Jackie and Kara looking back on their special days

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Buffalo Wings & Rings president Nader Masadeh goes undercover to work in his own company to ensure his standards are being executed across the brand

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Shawnon Bellah, the chief operating officer of Nestlé Toll House Café by Chip, goes undercover in her own company. Ever since Shawnon came on board, the firm has been expanding its franchise locations at a rapid pace. She wants to ensure that as they grow, they aren't losing the quality and consistency that has made their brand so profitable

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in at the 90-year-old Monticello Hotel in Longview, Washington, where owner Phillip Lovingfoss has an apparent liking for alcohol that some of his staff claim is threatening to destroy the business. The challenge of turning around the hotel's fortunes only increases when the chef sees shocking allegations about Phillip splashed all over the front page of the local newspaper

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: In Oregon, Gordon Ramsay tries to rescue the Applegate River Lodge, which is around $1million in debt. The chef questions whether owner Richard Davis's interest in smoking cannabis is distracting him from the problems at this family-built inn, and encounters Richard's sons Duke and Dusty, whose fiery relationship seems to prevent them from working together to tackle the establishment's financial troubles

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave threatens to dampen high spirits at an early morning auction, and Mary struggles to stop the other buyers from getting her down

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The teams make a long trip to auctions in Palm Desert, and Mary plays a risky game when she bids way beyond her budget

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In East Anglia, three rival couples compete to host the best dinner party and win £1,000. First up are ultra-competitive poker players Kim and Martin. Their teamwork is tested to the limit whilst preparing their menu of family favourites, with both cooks jostling to take charge. On night two, Debbie and Richard host an Orient Express-themed night of elegance fit for Agatha Christie herself, while finishing off the week are self-proclaimed gadget kings Jamie and Mark, who have a swishy piece of tech for just about every kitchen job going

programme.sub-title: And Then a Detective Comes In

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr invites Sean Lock and Miles Jupp to go up against Jon Richardson and Sara Pascoe in the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz. programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Jonny wants to split up with his girlfriend - and boss - Liz, but is too scared to do so, while Adam is happy to keep teasing him about her age. Meanwhile, Dad has been drying fish under the stairs and Grandma somehow manages to get locked in the boot of Adam's car when she comes round for dinner. Comedy, starring Tom Rosenthal

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: The boys come home to find the builders have been in and the house is in a complete mess. On top of this, there's a mouse loose and Mum takes refuge in the shed, leaving Dad in charge of making dinner. Jim pops round to see if he can help, and is invited for his first-ever Friday night dinner with the Goodmans. Comedy, with Mark Heap

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jeremy agrees to marry Nancy to make her eligible for a visa, and while the would-be bride insists it is purely an administrative procedure, Mark is not sure his friend views the ceremony the same way. Comedy, starring David Mitchell and Robert Webb

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark is distraught after being mugged by two teenagers, and becomes oblivious to Sophie's advances. Jeremy faces a moral dilemma as he waits for the return of his girlfriend, but is offered a threesome. Comedy, starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to be romantic when the family goes on holiday to Hawaii, and Jay realises it will not be as relaxing as he had hoped. Elsewhere, Mitch and Cam cannot decide whether to go sightseeing, and the children run riot. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old car, Mitchell decides to build a large princess castle for Lily, and Manny invites a girl over for a study date - which makes Gloria uncomfortable. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mother when she finds out that Alex has a crush on a boy, and Haley's idea of sisterly advice is not helping matters. Meanwhile, Mitchell and Cameron have an argument over the former's aversion to public displays of affection, and Gloria believes that her grandmother has been visiting in her dreams. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The couples mark their one-month anniversaries, but some of them cannot quite believe it has only been a month and not an eternity

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: A lie spirals into a gigantic conflict for one couple, and with revelations happening left, right and centre, all of the relationships start shifting in new directions

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Spanish Pavillion, Kingston Cafe, La Frite and Capri
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he earlier tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or fell by the wayside. First he visits the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, then heads to California to see the owners of Kingston Cafe, French-themed La Frite, and Capri

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog (2020)
programme.desc: Sonic, a blue hedgehog who can run at supersonic speeds, is transported to Earth. A decade later, while enjoying life in Montana, his speedy skills create an electromagnetic pulse. Scientific genius Dr Robotnik is hired to investigate, and becomes obsessed with capturing the creature for his power. Live-action fantasy adventure based on the video games, starring James Marsden and Jim Carrey, with the voice of Ben Schwartz

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Mr Burns fight for the soul of brash young football prodigy Grayson Mathers

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: It's the grand finale, and in Kuala Lumpur, the top three teams are put to the ultimate test using skills they've perfected during the race so far. They're tasked with recreating a dessert with help from a python, hunting for a treasure map in a bookstore, and making their way to the other side of the city by any means possible. The duos must also recall locations from the places they've raced through, before a pit stop finish like never before

programme.title: Moonfall (2022)
programme.desc: A mysterious force knocks the Moon from its orbit and sends the Earth's only natural satellite on a collision course with our planet. Astronauts Jocinda Fowler and Brian Harper, who served together on an ill-fated space mission, join forces with conspiracy theorist KC Houseman to avert catastrophe. Director Roland Emmerich's sci-fi thriller, starring Patrick Wilson, Halle Berry, John Bradley and Donald Sutherland in one of his final films

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hordes of the creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of six potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 43-year-old Cathy from Hertfordshire who, with her biological clock ticking, is wanting to settle down and have children. The trouble is she's open to dating men from their 20s to their 60s and finds it hard to choose. Will she find it easier to pick the right partner when they're all naked? Then, 24-year-old Londoner Adam takes centre stage. He hates online dating and has decided to bare all in order to find the perfect match

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With a fractious atmosphere in the air, the couples head off for a weekend retreat. And there are big questions looming for all of the newlyweds

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay and Gloria celebrate their anniversary, but cannot decide on what kind of gift to give each other. Meanwhile, the Dunphys join Alex on her college tour and Phil, Luke and Haley find themselves in a mirrored waiting room with a button and a sign that says 'Do Not Push'. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil comes across footage of an incriminating sneeze while looking at Cameron and Mitchell's wedding video that proves he is responsible for the family's flu epidemic, so he sets about getting rid of the proof with the help of Luke and some creative editing. Claire struggles to make it through an important business meeting while feeling under the weather, while Cam is forced to make a difficult decision when it comes to Manny and the school football team. Mitch meets Lily's know-it-all friend and male nanny Andy (Andy DeVine) makes a welcome return

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer falls out with Marge over revelations contained in an old letter, and moves into the home of a gay couple who keep him happy by plying him with food. With the guest voice of 'Weird Al' Yankovic

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family spends Christmas on a ranch, where Lisa falls in love with an older boy, and Homer and Bart help locals protesting against a dam built by industrious beavers. Featuring the guest voices of David Byrne, Jonathan Taylor Thomas and Andy Serkis

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Santa's Little Helper is thrown out of the house for failing to save Homer from a fire - but goes on to earn a fortune as the new Duff Beer mascot, making him the subject of a bitter ownership battle

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer has his driving licence revoked for being a menace to other road-users, forcing Marge to take charge of the family car and run endless errands for everyone - a responsibility she soon starts to resent. Featuring the guest voices of Steve Busmen and singer-songwriter Jackson Browne

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta enlists Jeffords to help him tackle a cold case that everyone thinks is unsolvable. Meanwhile, Santiago plans a romantic weekend away with her new boyfriend Teddy, and Gina and Diaz tell Boyle one of their best-kept secrets. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta suspects a civic leader of money laundering, but his investigation is shut down by the police commissioner. Determined to crack the case, he enlists Santiago and Holt to help uncover more evidence - and risks suspension as a result. Boyle is devastated when Vivian ends their relationship, so his colleagues try to cheer him up

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers at Jay and Gloria's to celebrate Alex's graduation, but Phil is devastated to be missing the occasion thanks to an ear infection preventing him from flying home from a business trip to Seattle. Jay frets about Gloria's cousin, who has overstayed his welcome, while Claire stresses about giving Alex the perfect gift. Mitch hides important news from Cam, and Andy and Haley finally come to a realisation about their feelings for each other

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The return of the American comedy about a man and his extended family living in three different households. Recent events force Haley and Andy to cope with their emotions in different ways, while Jay and Gloria are in for a shock when they start looking for a pre-school for Joe. Plus, Cam attempts to remain supportive of Mitch's midlife career crisis, but when money begins to get tight, he hatches a plan. Ed O'Neill Stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: The Day Alex Left for College
programme.desc: Phil and Claire feel rejected when Alex deliberately tells them the wrong date for her moving-in day at college as she wants to keep things as low-key as possible, while Luke makes it clear he would rather hang out with schoolfriends than spend the day with his dad. Elsewhere, the rest of the family come up with an elaborate excuse to avoid going to Lily's football game, and things get stressful for Mitch and Cam now after they decided to rent out their top floor

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil helps Haley persuade Claire to let Dylan move in, but he soon has second thoughts after he discovers just what living with him really means. Meanwhile, Mitch takes on a much-needed new role working for Jay's business rivals Closets, Closets, Closets, Closets! and Gloria and Cameron come to blows over how to deal with Manny's problem at school.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a doting father and decides to spend quality time with his youngest daughter when he discovers Santa's Little Helper knows Maggie better than he does. Meanwhile, a lonely Moe joins an online dating agency, and gets a pleasant surprise when he meets an attractive woman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Sad and the Drugly
programme.desc: Bart is on his best behaviour as he tries to win the affections of a girl at his school, while Lisa reports on what Springfield will look like in 50 years. With the voice of Anne Hathaway (Les Miserables)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to eat bland food after he burns his taste buds while trying to copy a fire-eating street performer. He becomes a regular at Springfield Elementary's canteen where he learns a new parenting technique to try out on Bart and Lisa - but its overbearing nature leads to disaster. Meanwhile, Marge enjoys a sauna she discovers in the basement

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer rent an apartment in an affluent area so their children can have a good education when Springfield Elementary is rated the worst school in the state. Bart wastes no time in establishing a bad-boy persona, and increases Lisa's popularity by telling people she knows a pop star. With the voice of Elliot Page (Juno)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The village gathers for Diane's funeral, and Dee Dee struggles to hide her emotions after a recent discovery. Elsewhere, Beth continues to seek justice, and a resident's trauma catches up with them

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a union representative at the power plant and immediately uses his new-found authority to save the company's free dental plan and avoid having to pay for Lisa's new braces. Featuring the voice of Dr Joyce Brothers

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: As the retreat winds down, one couple make amends while others begin planning for the future. However, a serious roadblock forces one pair to confront deep issues and question whether their marriage can last the distance

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Strictly Come Dancing, Our Dementia Choir Sings Again with Vicky McClure, First Dates Hotel, My Possessed Pet, This Morning, The Ex-Wife and Sue Perkins: Perfectly Legal. Plus, thoughts on ITV News' of possible power shortages. First shown in October 2022

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: An edition from October 2022, in which the armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions to I Can See Your Voice, Emmerdale, Strictly Come Dancing, Unbreakable, The Ex-Wife, Bargain Hunt, and news coverage of a new Chancellor

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 22-year-old gym addict Sophie from Surrey, who is desperate to find a man who boasts a little banter. Next up is Dom, a 25-year-old wedding model from Bournemouth. He wants to find the perfect man to waltz him down the aisle and thinks people that can guarantee to do this are confident, daring and adventurous in their outlook

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Recruitment consultant Lee sits down for a meal with Abbi, who lives a more civilised lifestyle than he does. Septuagenarian Deanna, who hasn't been on a date in 20 years, meets ex-car mechanic Alex, but he seems more interested in the waiter than in her, while beauty ambassador Bianca is paired with Teza, who prides himself on being an entertainer, but admits that his cockiness is a mask for his own insecurity

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: An edition from October 2022, in which the armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions to I Can See Your Voice, Emmerdale, Strictly Come Dancing, Unbreakable, The Ex-Wife, Bargain Hunt, and news coverage of a new Chancellor

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: As the retreat winds down, one couple make amends while others begin planning for the future. However, a serious roadblock forces one pair to confront deep issues and question whether their marriage can last the distance

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield is the setting for parodies of Mad Men, Michael Bay's Transformers and It's the Great Pumpkin, Charlie Brown in this Halloween-themed episode. Homer's vote on election day is misread by a renegade machine, Lisa's Malibu Stacy car turns into a robot determined to start a war, and a giant pumpkin seeks revenge

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam plans to attend the school dance with Dana, and reluctantly agrees to take dancing lessons with Beverly. Meanwhile, Murray is forced to have the 'talk' with Adam, but he admits that he hasn't spoken to Barry about sex yet. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam worries that sexual tension may develop between him and his long-time friend Emmy. Beverly is caught reading Erica's diary, and vows to trust her daughter instead of snooping in future. However, her new faith is soon taken advantage of. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with groom Chris, who planned a woodland fairy-tale wedding for his bride Corinne back in 2012. They relive the highs and lows with best man Alex and bridesmaid Sam

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Strictly Come Dancing, Our Dementia Choir Sings Again with Vicky McClure, First Dates Hotel, My Possessed Pet, This Morning, The Ex-Wife and Sue Perkins: Perfectly Legal. Plus, thoughts on ITV News' of possible power shortages. First shown in October 2022

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dina, 39, is keen to settle down and start a family, but her date, 41-year-old Stephen, is a born adventurer who has climbed the Matterhorn and swum oceans. Will he run a mile when she shares her intentions with him? Margaret, 73, hasn't been on a date for 44 years and is looking for a family man who shares her love of music and life, while art student Rachel, meets vegan singer-songwriter and self-confessed hippie Hari

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on the Eurovision Song Contest, Faking It, Virgin Island, The Four Seasons, Night Coppers, Inside Our Minds, Naked and Afraid, and Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to be romantic when the family goes on holiday to Hawaii, and Jay realises it will not be as relaxing as he had hoped. Elsewhere, Mitch and Cam cannot decide whether to go sightseeing, and the children run riot. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire's plans for a family portrait do not go smoothly, and Cameron reveals his inner diva. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen and Eric Stonestreet

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. Things look up for one family, while panic sets in for another, and the police give the Osbornes some worrying news. Two residents decide to move forward together, and Warren steps in to help Mercedes. Friends support Tony as he tries to find the words for Diane's eulogy. Dodger and Theresa take their relationship to the next level, and a resident makes a discovery that stops them in their tracks

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old car, Mitchell decides to build a large princess castle for Lily, and Manny invites a girl over for a study date - which makes Gloria uncomfortable. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mother when she finds out that Alex has a crush on a boy, and Haley's idea of sisterly advice is not helping matters. Meanwhile, Mitchell and Cameron have an argument over the former's aversion to public displays of affection, and Gloria believes that her grandmother has been visiting in her dreams. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: The couples mark their one-month anniversaries, but some of them cannot quite believe it has only been a month and not an eternity

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: A lie spirals into a gigantic conflict for one couple, and with revelations happening left, right and centre, all of the relationships start shifting in new directions

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Spanish Pavillion, Kingston Cafe, La Frite and Capri
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he earlier tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or fell by the wayside. First he visits the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, then heads to California to see the owners of Kingston Cafe, French-themed La Frite, and Capri

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. In the first of two visits to Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, the chef encounters Joe Nagy, who claims he has the best menu from New York to Los Angeles. However, his servers and diners tell a different story, and his resistance to change leads to some explosive confrontations

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog (2020)
programme.desc: Sonic, a blue hedgehog who can run at supersonic speeds, is transported to Earth. A decade later, while enjoying life in Montana, his speedy skills create an electromagnetic pulse. Scientific genius Dr Robotnik is hired to investigate, and becomes obsessed with capturing the creature for his power. Live-action fantasy adventure based on the video games, starring James Marsden and Jim Carrey, with the voice of Ben Schwartz

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa becomes insecure about her size after she and Bart contract a bizarre infection that requires treatment from steroids that cause temporary weight gain

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Portrait of a Lackey on Fire
programme.desc: Homer offers to play matchmaker for Smithers and introduces him to jetsetting fashion designer mogul Michael de Graaf

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A teenage Homer embarks on a road trip in the company of Grampa to look for his mother

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge select Fat Tony to be Maggie's godfather, but are worried about his influence on her

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Mr Burns fight for the soul of brash young football prodigy Grayson Mathers

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: It's the grand finale, and in Kuala Lumpur, the top three teams are put to the ultimate test using skills they've perfected during the race so far. They're tasked with recreating a dessert with help from a python, hunting for a treasure map in a bookstore, and making their way to the other side of the city by any means possible. The duos must also recall locations from the places they've raced through, before a pit stop finish like never before

programme.title: Moonfall (2022)
programme.desc: A mysterious force knocks the Moon from its orbit and sends the Earth's only natural satellite on a collision course with our planet. Astronauts Jocinda Fowler and Brian Harper, who served together on an ill-fated space mission, join forces with conspiracy theorist KC Houseman to avert catastrophe. Director Roland Emmerich's sci-fi thriller, starring Patrick Wilson, Halle Berry, John Bradley and Donald Sutherland in one of his final films

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hordes of the creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Bad Sisters, Nadiya's Everyday Baking, The Kardashians, Super/Natural, Emma Willis: Delivering Babies, and A Trip to Infinity, as well as BBC News reports on the energy cap and a U-turn by Kwasi Kwarteng. First broadcast in October 2022

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Divorced couple Stuart and Mandy arrive in the restaurant to offer each other moral support as they try to find love again. Mandy wants an adventurer to whisk her off her feet, and her date, globetrotting Adam, could be just the ticket. Across the restaurant, sparks are also flying as Stuart's cheeky humour has fellow divorcee Claire in stitches. Meanwhile, 30-year-old financial manager J meets aesthetic therapist Sophie, and 23-year-old Nathan has his work cut out to try and win over 21-year-old Morganne

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of six potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 43-year-old Cathy from Hertfordshire who, with her biological clock ticking, is wanting to settle down and have children. The trouble is she's open to dating men from their 20s to their 60s and finds it hard to choose. Will she find it easier to pick the right partner when they're all naked? Then, 24-year-old Londoner Adam takes centre stage. He hates online dating and has decided to bare all in order to find the perfect match

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Bad Sisters, Nadiya's Everyday Baking, The Kardashians, Super/Natural, Emma Willis: Delivering Babies, and A Trip to Infinity, as well as BBC News reports on the energy cap and a U-turn by Kwasi Kwarteng. First broadcast in October 2022

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: In a feature-length episode, groom Andy plans an authentic Ukrainian wedding in fiancee Anna's homeland, hoping both she and her mother will be impressed with his efforts. Unknown to him, however, they are banking on a very British bash

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The police give the Osbornes some worrying news, two residents decide to move forward together, and when Warren steps in to help Mercedes, sparks might re-ignite

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Friends support Tony as he tries to find the words for Diane's eulogy. Dodger and Theresa take their relationship to the next level, and a resident makes a discovery that stops them in their tracks

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cumbria is the location for three more couples to demonstrate their cooking and hosting skills, kicking off with teachers Rory and Sam, who serve up dishes inspired by Europe. Day two sees Sarka and Paul lay on a Czech menu, but the massive portions defeat everyone - except the ever-hungry Rory. Finally, it's the turn of John and Sally with their retro 1980s evening. Which couple will win the cash prize of £1,000?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 2019 edition of the culinary competition begins with cake week and the first stage challenge features a fruit cake, while the technical is a retro classic that requires intricate decoration. Finally, for the showstopper, the contestants must create the birthday cake they wish they had received as a child. Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig present, with Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith doing the judging

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host the second round of the culinary competition, which this time focuses on biscuits. For the signature round, the contestants must concoct a luxurious chocolate-coated bake. The technical challenge is a nostalgic one for Paul Hollywood, who asks the contestants to prepare a snack that was a favourite of his father's. Finally, the showstopper round requires the bakers to rise to an eye-catching challenge that is designed to test which of them will snap under the pressure

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host the third stage of the culinary competition, with judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. Bread week has arrived, and the remaining bakers face the challenge of proving their worth with Paul's speciality. First, the contestants must prepare a signature bake that is designed to be shared, while the ingredients for a popular summer staple are lurking beneath the gingham cloth in the technical challenge. Finally, an ambitious showstopper will test their steady hands and artistic flair

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host dairy week, with Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood judging the bakers' efforts. The first of the three challenges is a decorative signature bake that involves a tricky turn-out. The bakers then move onto the technical, which is a complex recipe with a long history that dates back to Henry VIII. With the first day behind them, the contestants regroup for the final challenge of the week - an intricate showstopper usually found at the centre of Indian weddings

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: After years of suffering in silence, Francisca Quintero finally leaves her violent husband. But for him, there is no such thing as a divorce

programme.title: The Real Murders on Elm Street
programme.desc: A house on Elm Street goes up in flames, leaving two people dead. Police race the clock to catch the killer before they strike again

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: A case in which a student was found strangled and stabbed in her own home. Family, friends and the town of Valley City, North Dakota, helped police identify her killer

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: As two rival street gangs prepare to settle their differences in all-out battle, Hooker sets out to catch the villain stirring up trouble between them - an illegal arms dealer. Vintage American police drama, starring William Shatner

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The dedicated cop finds himself trapped in a department store lift - with an armed criminal for company. American police drama, starring William Shatner

programme.title: T.J. Hooker

Sci-fi adventure, starring Sean Bean and Corey Sevier

programme.title: Bite the Bullet (1975)
programme.desc: A newspaper organises a gruelling 700-mile horse race across the wilderness, with a substantial cash prize at stake. Two former cavalry soldiers must put their friendship to one side to compete for first place, but face stiff competition in a cunning prostitute, an English sportsman and a cocky would-be gunslinger. Western, starring Gene Hackman, Candice Bergen, James Coburn and Ian Bannen

programme.title: The Legend of Butch & Sundance (2004)
programme.desc: The story of how two of America's most infamous outlaws joined forces and tried to make their fortunes with a string of daring robberies. Western, starring David Rogers, Ryan Browning, Rachelle Lefevre and Michael Biehn

programme.title: Against a Crooked Sky (1975)
programme.desc: A man recruits a prospector to help him save his sister, but is forced to endure a terrible challenge to bring her safely home. Western, starring Richard Boone and Stewart Petersen

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A woman is forced to fight for her life when two miniature alien invaders appear in her home. Agnes Moorhead guests

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid bank clerk recovers from a car accident to find he has gained the power to read people's minds

programme.title: The Yards (2000)
programme.desc: An ex-con vows to stick to the straight and narrow, so is relieved when his uncle offers him a decent job - but soon realises the favour comes at a high price as he is drawn back into the murky world of corruption and double-dealing, and becomes a wanted man once more. Crime drama, starring Mark Wahlberg, James Caan, Joaquin Phoenix, Charlize Theron and Ellen Burstyn

programme.title: The Sentinel (2006)
programme.desc: A secret service agent is convinced a member of a neo-Nazi militant group has infiltrated the White House. But his attempt to investigate comes to a halt when he is framed for murder and blackmailed over his affair with the president's wife. As he battles to clear his name, his former protege is given the task of bringing him to justice. Spy thriller, starring Michael Douglas, Kiefer Sutherland, Eva Longoria and Kim Basinger

programme.title: Empire State (2013)
programme.desc: A security guard who failed in his ambition to become a cop is dragged into helping his friend with an armoured car robbery that proves to be the biggest in US history, leaving them in danger from the police and gangsters who do not take kindly to loose cannons on their turf. Crime thriller, starring Liam Hemsworth, Emma Roberts and Dwayne Johnson

programme.title: The House that Dripped Blood (1970)
programme.desc: Compilation of four tales of terror, all linked to a mysterious mansion. A writer's strange obsessions prove deadly, a little girl dabbles in voodoo, a jealous husband vows to wreak revenge and an actor takes his passion for realism too far. Starring Christopher Lee, Peter Cushing, John Bennett, Jon Pertwee and Denholm Elliott.
